examples: The Indonesia rupiah is at a three-year high.
Some 19m poor families are receiving 100,000 rupiah a month.
Rupiah (Rp) is the monetary unit of Indonesia (currency code IDR).
The Indonesian rupiah, which offered a very attractive 15% back then, has plunged 53% since.
In the 1997-98 Asian crisis, Indonesia's rupiah dropped by over 75% before gradually creeping back.
